photodetector.note: Calibrated RP DC-path response after the current DC attenuation/splitting chain. Set null to estimate from model + dc_path.

scope_zero.note: Optional display-only scope zero offsets. They are subtracted from the PyRPL scope GUI traces and power readout, but raw captures and PID logic stay unchanged.

dc_path.note: Nominal DC attenuation before RP input; explicit photodetector.scope_response_v_per_w overrides this estimate.

rf_path.note: Measured total RF gain seen by RP/FPS4 for bias tee + amplifier; used as spectrum external_gain_db.

sensitivity.note: When pressure_calibration_path is empty, the dashboard reads pressure_calibration_root/<pressure_source_model>/calibration.meta.json and uses its default_processed_file. pressure_quantity is pk for peak pressure or rms for RMS pressure.
